source.method: curl the HF LeRobot mirror's meta/tasks.jsonl (one JSON obj per line, {task_index, task}); collected unique non-empty 'task' values

instructions: sweep the green cloth to the left side of the table
put the ranch bottle into the pot
pick up the blue cup and put it into the brown cup.
take the tiger out of the red bowl and put it in the grey bowl
put the marker into the bowl
